title: Incorrect result from a subquery containing over-constrainted ORDER BY
poc: SELECT quote((SELECT x FROM t2, t1 ORDER BY x, y));
SELECT x FROM ... ORDER BY x, y, z;
SELECT x FROM ... ORDER BY x;
key_bug_features: Subquery with over-constrained ORDER BY clause
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(x INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, y TEXT);
CREATE TABLE t2(y INTEGER, z REAL);
SELECT quote((SELECT x FROM t1, t2 ORDER BY x, y));
